role: Senior Member of Technical Staff (SDE III) — Tech Lead
duration: Promoted to Tech Lead in Oct 2025
details: Technical lead for Oracle Health’s Clinical Reporting / Output Management team, owning MRO / Clinical Reporting Gen2, used by 25+ concept teams with 20+ additional concepts on the roadmap.

Architected and implemented 7+ microservices for a Java Micronaut medical-record output platform, redesigning it into a modular Gen2 reporting system across APIs, templates, data extraction, report generation, and PDF assembly.
Introduced asynchronous processing, fast/slow lanes, bulk generation, retries, DLQ handling, idempotency, horizontal scaling, authN/authZ, audit logging, metrics, dashboards, and alerting.
Led delivery across 49 closed epics, 39 planned epics, 89 Jira items, and 251 story points spanning architecture, releases, compliance, monitoring, and deployment readiness.
Optimized a 262-page report from 9.0s to 4.2s, reduced heap from 891.7MB to 426.2MB, and reduced output from 17.6MB to 13.7MB.
Supported 20+ Gen2 concept onboardings and reduced onboarding time from roughly two weeks to under one week.
Built and led the India Clinical Reporting team, with leadership experience across 10+ engineers, 3+ products, 25+ cross-functional teams, 100+ interviews, and 20+ hires.
Developed education-domain features in the Search India team for exam OSRPs and structured educational content.
Built the Exam Quiz feature to improve engagement with interactive learning modules.
Migrated architecture from entity-driven to intent-driven, impacting 0.05% of Search traffic.
That measured reach maps to an estimated 1M+ daily-query scale when applied to Google’s public baseline of billions of searches per day.
Launched localized Exam OSRP experiences in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu.
Designed and integrated a scalable Language API for Indic locales in lower-tier cities.
Collaborated across teams to resolve issues, align requirements, and prioritize improvements.
Worked in a large-scale monorepo using C++, Java, Python, gRPC, protobuf, and internal technologies.
Built statistical and ML-powered systems in Amazon Finance Automation to detect invoice fraud, duplicates, and anomalies at scale.
Supported a finance ingestion surface receiving 1 lakh+ invoice create/update requests every day across retail, non-retail, and corporate workflows.
Implemented 3 anomaly-detection rules using Isolation Forest, identifying over 100M USD in anomalies.
Reduced anomaly reporting latency from 24 hours to near real time through Gandalf-Veritas integration.
Built APIs and monitoring dashboards and used AWS CDK for infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines.
Developed microservices using Java, Kotlin, TypeScript, Python, ML, Elasticsearch, DynamoDB, Coral, Smithy, and AWS.
Created and tested algorithmic problems for hiring contests at companies including Infosys, Google, Facebook, Nokia, PayPal, and Salesforce.
Presented a 2-day / 10+ hour advanced data structures and algorithms workshop at MNIT Jaipur to 120+ attendees.
